page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4g.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

A key characteristic of this instance is its integrated local storage, which consists of 7679 GB of SSD capacity. This local storage is bundled directly with the instance. For network connectivity, the server delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. The underlying virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

Given the high density of dedicated physical cores and the substantial local SSD storage capacity, this instance offers a resource-dense profile for workloads requiring high-throughput local I/O without the latency of network-attached storage. It is suitable for large-scale databases, big data analytics, and storage-intensive enterprise applications that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation and high-speed local SSDs.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4g.32xlarge is an x86_64 server instance designed for storage-intensive and compute-heavy workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor, it features 128 dedicated physical cores operating at 2.7 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, translating to 4.0 GB of memory per core. A key hardware feature is the inclusion of 7679 GB of bundled local SSD storage, which provides high-capacity, low-latency data access. Running on the KVM hypervisor, the server also provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for large-scale database deployments, big data processing, and storage-heavy enterprise applications that require dedicated CPU resources and high-speed local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4g.32xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, 7679 GB of local SSD storage, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth for storage-intensive workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 128-core server featuring 7.6 TB of local SSD storage and 64 Gbps bandwidth for storage-intensive enterprise workloads.
